en.editor_help_fallback:
📖 Translation Editor Help

📂 File: Open / Save / Refresh
✍️ Editing: Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y / Ctrl+S
🔀 Diff: Compare with original
🔧 Operations: Mass edit / Auto-translate
✅ Check: Export CSV / Quality / Spelling
⌨️ Hotkeys: Ctrl+S, Ctrl+A, Ctrl+F, Esc
en.editor_help_content:
Translation Editor Help:

📂 Open File — Load XML translation file
💾 Save — Save changes
➕ Add — Add new entry
❌ Delete — Delete selected entry

Keyboard Shortcuts:
Ctrl+Z    — Undo
Ctrl+Y    — Redo
Ctrl+S    — Save
Ctrl+F    — Search
Ctrl+H    — Replace
Ctrl+Down — Next entry
Ctrl+Up   — Previous entry
Ctrl+ Enter- Save and next
F2        — Rename key
Delete    — Delete entry

en.doc_debug_rotation: Write to debug.log with rotation (10 MB)

en.doc_quick_step1_4: Specify the output folder for translations
en.doc_quick_step6_2: All actions are logged to debug.log
en.doc_quick_step6_4: In the log dialog you can save the file
en.doc_engines_content:
Available translation engines:
• Google Translate — fast and stable
• MyMemory — large vocabulary
• DeepL (web) — high quality translation
• Bing Translator — alternative option
• DeepLX (local server) — for bypassing blocks (requires DeepLX server)
• Translators (20+ engines) — library with many services
• LibreTranslate — own server (open source)
• Argos Translate — offline translator

Smart routing:
• Automatically prioritizes engines by success rate
• Falls back to next engine on failure
• Configurable in 'Settings → Engines' tab

Additional features:
• Smart splitting of long text into sentences
• Rate limiting — protection from IP bans
• Glossary — custom terminology dictionary
en.doc_translation_mode: Translation mode: separate mod or into source folder
en.doc_translation_structure: Create translation mods with proper structure
en.doc_ui_langs: 5 UI languages (ru, en, de, fr, es)
en.about_description:
Professional tool for translating and verifying RimWorld mods.
Auto translation via Google Translate, dependency checking,
duplicate detection and full translation editor.
en.doc_quickstart_content:
1. Specify RimWorld mods folder in settings
2. Go to Translation tab and select mods
3. Set source and target languages
4. Click 'Start translation'
5. Check results on Verification tab
6. Edit in 'Editor' if needed
en.doc_translation_content:
Automatic translation:
• Select mods from the list — check the ones you need
• Set languages: source (usually English) and target (e.g. Russian)
• Click 'Start translation' — process can be cancelled

Translation settings:
• "Create translation mod" (recommended) — translation saved in separate folder
• "Translate in source folder" — translation overwrites original

Tag filters:
• 'Filters' tab allows configuring which XML tags are extracted
• Whitelist — tags to extract (li, rule, description...)
• Blacklist — technical tags to skip (defName, recipeWorkers...)
en.doc_verification_content:
Mod verification includes:
• Translation check — finding empty and untranslated entries
• Dependency check — detecting missing parent mods
• Conflict detection — finding incompatible mods

Report export:
• TXT — plain text file
• JSON — structured data
• HTML — formatted report for browser
en.doc_editor_content:
Translation editor allows:
• Opening XML translation files for manual editing
• Using Undo/Redo (Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y)
• Find and replace (Ctrl+F / Ctrl+H)
• Mass editing of multiple entries
• Spell check for RU/EN/DE/FR/ES
• Diff comparison with original (character-level highlighting)
• RimWorld terminology glossary
• Auto-save every 5 seconds
• Drag & Drop files to open

Editor hotkeys:
• Ctrl+S — Save
• Ctrl+↓/↑ — Next/previous entry
• Ctrl+Enter — Save and go to next
• F2 — Rename key
• Delete — Delete entry
en.doc_settings_content:
Settings tab contains:
• Paths: mods folder, output folder, game path
• Appearance: fonts, colors, themes
• Translation: mode (separate mod / source folder)
• Verification: check language

Settings presets:
• Save current settings to file
• Load settings from preset file
• Reset all settings to defaults

Themes (8 themes):
• Light, Dark, Ocean, Forest (standard)
• Solar, Vapor, Cyborg, Superhero (additional)
• Icons adapt colors to each theme
en.doc_hotkeys_content:
Global:
  Ctrl+O — Open mods folder
  Ctrl+S — Save settings
  Ctrl+L — Clear log

Tools:
  Ctrl+Shift+V — Verification
  Ctrl+Shift+F — Full check
  Ctrl+Shift+D — Debug mode

Editor:
  Ctrl+Z — Undo
  Ctrl+Y — Redo
  Ctrl+F — Find
  Ctrl+H — Replace
  Delete — Delete entry

Full list: Help → "Keyboard Shortcuts"
